name: Agricultural Sprayer System Configuration
description: You are an Agricultural Technician commissioning a new heavy-lift crop-spraying drone. The hardware (tanks, pumps, and rotary atomizers) has been physically mounted, but the flight controller software has not been configured to control it. Read the mechanical integration manual at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/sprayer_integration_manual.txt to determine the correct safety and operational parameters for the spray system. Configure all 6 required ArduPilot parameters in QGroundControl as specified in the manual so the flight controller can automatically manage the spray system.
